1.name: 80GB Stable
1.description: Default recommendation for baseline runs and modest architectural exploration.
1.rationale: 80 GB-class GPUs provide materially more headroom for the baseline and near-term experiments while still staying within commonly available Runpod stock.

2.name: 96GB+ Premium
2.description: High-headroom profile for aggressive experimentation and reduced OOM risk.
2.rationale: The current Runpod catalog includes 96 GB, 141 GB, and 143 GB classes. This profile prioritizes those when budget allows.

preferred_gpu_type_ids: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition
NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition
NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Max-Q Workstation Edition
